quote: Only place to go from Failure is to Win.
author: Tom Platz

quote: To be successful, you must dedicate yourself 100% to your training, diet and mental approach.

quote: If you want something you"ve never had before, you have to be willing to do something you"ve never done before.

quote: All progress takes place outside the comfort zone.

quote: You can have results or excuses, but not both.

quote: The real workout starts when you want to stop.

quote: Don"t stop when you"re tired, Stop when you"re done.
